General.Name: Art Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Art Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of operation, management, and rental services of shopping malls and industrial parks in China. Art Group Holdings Limited was formerly known as Art Textile Technology International Company Limited and changed its name to Art Group Holdings Limited in September 2016. Art Group Holdings Limited is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Chinachem Century Tower, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
